The '''''Dantooine''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in service to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was part of a task force commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] during the [[Battle of Ciutric]].

{{Ship-stub}}
